title: carya ovalis var. hirsuta
intro: Carya ovalis var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy hickory, is a variety of hickory tree native to North America. Traditionally used in folk medicine, its bark, leaves, and roots possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carya ovalis var. hirsuta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
